---
title: "SaveLoom"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

#Run only in chunk:
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '/Users/robertvandervelde/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-robertvandervelde@sydshafferlab.com/My Drive/Vander_Velde_Share/Experiments/RV143')

getwd()

```


#Load Libraries:
```{r, include=FALSE}

rm(list = ls())
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratDisk)


getwd()

```

#Load strict barcode requirements seurat object:
```{r, include=FALSE}

seurat_strict_barcode_requirements <- readRDS("RV143_Comb_20250407_20250508_Seq/Post_Cluster_Analysis/Organized_Data/Create_Seurat_Objects/seurat_strict_barcode_requirements")

```

#Subset to just "enriched" or "transduced" sample:
```{r, include=FALSE}

Idents(seurat_strict_barcode_requirements) <- "orig.ident"

just_transduced <- subset(seurat_strict_barcode_requirements, orig.ident == "Enriched")

```

#Save loom file:

```{r, include=FALSE}

temp_seurat <- SetAssayData(
  just_transduced,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  new.data = GetAssayData(just_transduced, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
)

temp_seurat[["RNA"]]$counts <- NULL

print("Sample of data layer (should be raw counts):")
print(GetAssayData(temp_seurat, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")[1:10, 1:10])

# Don't normalize - keep only raw counts
SaveLoom(temp_seurat,
         filename = "RV143_Comb_20250407_20250508_Seq/Post_Cluster_Analysis/Organized_Data/SaveLoom/loom_for_SCENIC.loom")

```
